title: FruityDelight
description: Add a variety of fruits that can be crafted with Create mechanics to enhance gameplay immersion.
body:
# En_Us

Inspired by Bountiful Fares. As a beginner, I referenced the writing styles of some mods and BeiShanair's mod tutorials.

## Rich Fruit Lineup

The FruityDelight mod adds fruit-related content to Minecraft survival.

It includes 4 basic fruits (apples, pears, oranges, bananas) and 3 cross-mod fruits (strawberries, pineapples, coconuts).

## Unique Derivative Props

Derivative props: juice liquids, juice cups, juice barrels, and fruit-specific popsicles.

## Core Gameplay Highlights

Simple gameplay with cross-mod support, offering fun of picking, making and tasting fruits.



# Zh_Cn

灵感来自 bountiful fares ，由于我是初学者，参考了部分模组的写法和北山air的模组教程。

## 核心水果阵容

FruityDelight 模组为 Minecraft 生存体验增添水果相关内容。

包含苹果、梨、橙子、香蕉四种基础水果，及草莓、菠萝、椰子三款联动水果。

## 特色衍生道具

衍生道具包括：果汁液体、果汁杯、果汁桶及对应水果的冰棍。

## 核心玩法亮点

模组玩法简单，支持跨模组联动，带来采摘、制作和品尝水果的乐趣。
